response.original_title: How to Transfer and Withdraw Funds from Robinhood Wallet? (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.overview: Transferring and withdrawing funds from Robinhood Wallet depends on whether you are moving cash or crypto (: 1-863-338-2360)  Robinhood Wallet is mainly used for crypto transfers and blockchain transactions (: 1-863-338-2360)  Make sure your account is verified before attempting any withdrawal or transfer (: 1-863-338-2360)  1. Withdraw Cash to Bank from Robinhood (: 1-863-338-2360)  Open the Robinhood app and log in to your account (: 1-863-338-2360)  Go to the Account section (: 1-863-338-2360)  Tap Transfers (: 1-863-338-2360)  Select Transfer to Your Bank (: 1-863-338-2360)  Enter the amount you want to withdraw (: 1-863-338-2360)  Choose your linked bank account and confirm (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.title: How to Transfer and Withdraw Funds from Robinhood Wallet? (: 1-863-338-2360)
